---
format: html
---

## License {#license}

::: {.license}
This work is licensed under the **Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License (CC BY-SA 4.0)**.

<a rel="license" href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/"><img alt="CC BY-SA 4.0" src="https://licensebuttons.net/l/by-sa/4.0/88x31.png" /></a>

Text, tables, and figures may be cited and reprinted only with reference to this report. Images, photographs, and illustrations are protected by copyright.

### Terms

You are free to:
- **Share** — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format
- **Adapt** — remix, transform, and build upon the material

Under the following conditions:
- **Attribution** — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.
- **ShareAlike** — If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.

### Additional Restriction

**This work and its contents may not be used to train, fine-tune, or otherwise develop artificial intelligence models, machine learning systems, or similar technologies, regardless of whether such use is commercial or non-commercial.**

For the full legal text, see the [CC BY-SA 4.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/legalcode).
:::
